metadata.title: Who was Max Planck?
metadata.color_semantics: CREAM #F0EAD6 ground; INK #000000 all text; TEAL #009E73 good/true; CRIMSON #D55E00 bad/broken; SLATE #4D4D4D structure; GOLD #F0E442 highlight fill only
metadata.greeting_note: German hello — Planck was born in Kiel, Germany.
metadata.note: COLD OPEN LAW: B00 = ClaudeComposerAsk. ILLUSTRATE LAW: UI only at B00, B03, B08, B09. ASK→RESULT LAW: B03=ask micro-beat, B04=Manim result. HANDOFF LAW: B08='Your turn.' OUTRO LAW: B09=ClaudeTitleOutro restates title. Wonder register: first principles, genuine wonder, no drills, no exercise beat.
metadata.description_blurb: Max Planck didn't mean to start a revolution. He was a classicist trying to solve one stubborn problem: how does a hot object glow? What he found broke classical physics — and built everything that followed.

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file
